boundary_binding.action_boundary: May IAM execute the emergency admin enablement?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; audit-control pending blocks closure
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Policy requires full match before execution

final_answer: The action may not proceed. Source records indicate that while BG-UMA-075 covers most parameters for emergency admin enablement, the audit-control assignment remains pending. STD-UMA-075-P mandates a complete match, including audit-control, before enablement. The boundary is open due to this unresolved dependency, necessitating escalation.
